goal: After sign-in, return the user to where they were (reading result) not Profile; show real deck names in Gacha (were '? ? ?')
done: (1) SIGN-IN RETURN: kept clean redirectTo=/profile.html (allow-list-safe; NOT reverting to window.location.href which could re-break sign-in), but loginWithProvider stashes window.location.href in localStorage('mt_signin_return') before redirecting, and common.js bounces the now-signed-in user BACK to it once the session resolves (consumed once; no-op if same page → signing in FROM Profile stays). So a coin-popup sign-in on the reading result returns to that exact reading after a brief Profile beat. (2) GACHA NAMES: gacha showed '? ? ?' for un-owned decks — now shows the real deck name always (shop.js name.textContent = deckName(deck)); locked art scrim + dim styling still mark not-owned. Verified real browser. Cache-bust 20260623g -> 20260623h; www synced.
fix: stash+restore originating URL across sign-in (redirectTo stays clean profile.html); gacha shows real names.
verified: real-browser shop gacha: names = real deck names, 0 '?'
